sentences.target: L’avion atterrit bientôt sur la piste.

translations.fr: L’avion atterrit bientôt sur la piste.
translations.en: The plane is landing soon on the runway.
translations.es: El avión aterrizará pronto en la pista.
translations.de: Das Flugzeug landet bald auf der Landebahn.
translations.zh-Hans: 飞机很快会在跑道上降落。
translations.yue: 飛機好快會喺跑道降落。
translations.ru: Самолёт скоро приземлится на взлётно-посадочную полосу.
translations.pt: O avião vai pousar em breve na pista.
translations.vi: Máy bay sắp hạ cánh xuống đường băng.
translations.nl: Het vliegtuig landt binnenkort op de landingsbaan.
translations.uk: Літак скоро приземлиться на злітно-посадкову смугу.
translations.hu: A repülőgép hamarosan leszáll a kifutópályára.
translations.hi: विमान जल्द ही रनवे पर उतरेगा.
translations.pl: Samolot wkrótce wyląduje na pasie startowym.
translations.el: Το αεροπλάνο θα προσγειωθεί σύντομα στον διάδρομο.
translations.id: Pesawat akan segera mendarat di landasan.
translations.ro: Avionul va ateriza în curând pe pistă.
translations.ja: 飛行機はまもなく滑走路に着陸します。

tokens.explanation: Common noun serving as subject; includes elided definite article L’ (lemma: le), masculine singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, intransitive.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘piste’.
Common noun, object of the preposition ‘sur’, feminine singular.

sentences.target: Nous atterrissons à Paris vers midi.

translations.fr: Nous atterrissons à Paris vers midi.
translations.en: We’re landing in Paris around noon.
translations.es: Aterrizamos en París hacia el mediodía.
translations.de: Wir landen in Paris gegen Mittag.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们中午左右在巴黎降落。
translations.yue: 我哋大約中午喺巴黎降落。
translations.ru: Мы приземляемся в Париже около полудня.
translations.pt: Pousamos em Paris por volta do meio-dia.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hạ cánh tại Paris vào khoảng buổi trưa.
translations.ar: نحن نهبط في باريس حوالي الظهر.
translations.nl: We landen in Parijs rond het middaguur.
translations.uk: Ми приземляємося в Парижі близько полудня.
translations.hi: हम पेरिस में दोपहर के आसपास उतर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Προσγειωνόμαστε στο Παρίσι γύρω στο μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Vi lander i Paris rundt middagstid.
translations.id: Kami mendarat di Paris sekitar tengah hari.
translations.sv: Vi landar i Paris vid lunchtid.
translations.ro: Aterizăm la Paris în jurul prânzului.
translations.da: Vi lander i Paris omkring middagstid.
translations.ja: 私たちは正午ごろパリに着陸します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Preposition marking location/destination.
Proper noun, object of the preposition ‘à’.
Preposition indicating approximation of time.
Common noun denoting time of day; complement of ‘vers’.

sentences.target: Le pilote va atterrir après ce nuage.
sentences.reading: /lə pilɔt va atɛʁiʁ apʁɛ sə nɥaʒ/

translations.fr: Le pilote va atterrir après ce nuage.
translations.ipa: /lə pilɔt va atɛʁiʁ apʁɛ sə nɥaʒ/
translations.en: The pilot is going to land after this cloud.
translations.es: El piloto va a aterrizar después de esta nube.
translations.de: Der Pilot wird nach dieser Wolke landen.
translations.it: Il pilota atterrerà dopo questa nuvola.
translations.ko: 조종사는 이 구름을 지나고 나서 착륙할 것입니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 飞行员将在穿过这片云后降落。
translations.yue: 機師會喺過咗呢朵雲之後降落。
translations.pt: O piloto vai pousar depois desta nuvem.
translations.tr: Pilot bu bulutun ardından iniş yapacak.
translations.vi: Phi công sẽ hạ cánh sau đám mây này.
translations.ar: سوف يهبط الطيار بعد هذه السحابة.
translations.nl: De piloot zal na deze wolk landen.
translations.hu: A pilóta ezen felhő után fog leszállni.
translations.hi: पायलट इस बादल को पार करने के बाद उतरेगा.
translations.pl: Pilot wyląduje po przejściu przez tę chmurę.
translations.el: Ο πιλότος θα προσγειωθεί μετά από αυτό το σύννεφο.
translations.nb: Piloten vil lande etter denne skyen.
translations.id: Pilot akan mendarat setelah awan ini.
translations.sv: Piloten landar efter det här molnet.
translations.ro: Pilotul va ateriza după acest nor.
translations.cs: Pilot přistane po přeletu tohoto mraku.
translations.da: Piloten vil lande efter denne sky.
translations.ja: パイロットはこの雲を越えた後に着陸します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘pilote’.
Common noun, head of the subject NP.
Auxiliary ‘aller’ (futur proche), present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Infinitive verb complement of the auxiliary ‘va’.
Preposition introducing a temporal/postpositional complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies ‘nuage’.
Common noun, object of the preposition ‘après’.

translations.en: You have to land here now.
translations.zh-Hans: 你现在必须在这里降落。
translations.pt: Você tem que pousar aqui agora.
translations.vi: Bạn phải hạ cánh ở đây ngay bây giờ.
translations.id: Kamu harus mendarat di sini sekarang.
translations.ja: 今すぐここに着陸しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, subject.
Modal auxiliary expressing obligation, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Infinitive verb complement of the modal ‘devoir’.
Locative adverb specifying place.
Temporal adverb specifying immediacy.
